_comment: Per-model config profiles for Nimzo. 'match' is matched case-insensitively against model_id (substring). First matching profile wins.

profiles.description: Qwen3 series — belt-and-suspenders thinking control: extra_body flag + /no_think prefix
DeepSeek R1 series — always emits <think> blocks; extract them even when thinking nominally disabled
Llama series — no special handling needed
